items.title: Guidance: Taking part in the UK Emissions Trading Scheme markets
items.summary: This guidance explains the operation of the UK ETS markets and how to take part in auctions and in trading on the secondary market.

items.title: Guidance: Contracts for Difference (CfD) Allocation Round 7: Subsidy Control Transparency Database estimates
items.summary: Information on the estimates used for the subsidy amount for Contracts for Difference Allocation Round 7 on the Subsidy Control Transparency Database.

items.title: Official Statistics: Trade and investment factsheets: latest update
items.summary: The most up to date snapshot of the UK’s trade and investment positions with trading partners overseas.

items.title: Official Statistics: Trade and investment factsheets
items.summary: A snapshot of the UK’s trade and investment positions with individual trading and investment partners overseas.

items.title: Horizon Europe funding
items.summary: Funding for research or innovation that's ground breaking, improves European research standards or responds to challenges like climate change or food security.

items.title: Guidance: Subsidy Control Act 2022: Streamlined Routes
items.summary: Streamlined Routes (also known as Streamlined Subsidy Schemes) are a type of subsidy scheme made by the UK government for use by any UK public authority.

items.title: UK centre to lead the world in fusion diagnostics
items.summary: UKAEA launches Diagnostics Innovation Centre of Excellence (DICE) to strengthen UK's position as a world leader in fusion diagnostics.

items.title: Cumbrian collaboration expands robotics training into new era
items.summary: UKAEA and National College for Nuclear and Clean Energy launch CROSS (Cumbria Robotics Operations Skills Centre) to build UK’s robotics-enabled workforce.

items.title: Global fusion sector scaling up, creating UK SME opportunities
items.summary: UKAEA launches Global Fusion Guide for SMEs, helping businesses with clear, practical steps to collaborate with, and supply, fusion developers worldwide.

items.title: UKAEA unveils 2026-2030 fusion roadmap
items.summary: UK’s national fusion laboratory charts a clear mission and targets progress towards fusion energy and generating economic benefits for the UK.

items.title: Corporate report: Groceries Code Adjudicator: statutory review, 2022 to 2025
items.summary: Report setting out the findings and conclusions of the fourth statutory review of the Groceries Code Adjudicator (GCA).

items.title: Next generation empowered through Technical Excellence Colleges
items.summary: 19 new Technical Excellence Colleges will equip young people with the high-level technical skills needed to access well-paid, high-skilled jobs.

items.title: Accredited official statistics: Weekly road fuel prices
items.summary: Road fuel price statistics providing average UK retail 'pump' prices on a weekly basis.

items.title: Official Statistics: Road fuel sales, deliveries and stock levels: 28 June 2026
items.summary: Official statistics in development on average road fuel sales, deliveries and stock levels at sampled filling stations in the United Kingdom from 27 January 2020 to 28 June 2026.

items.title: Policy paper: UK Atomic Energy Authority strategy 2026 to 2030
items.summary: The strategy sets out how UKAEA will deliver foundational research, technology and innovation to support the UK fusion sector through world-leading expertise.

items.title: Notice: UK ETS Allocation Table for operators of installations
items.summary: This table contains a list of each installation’s free allocation for the 2021 to 2026 allocation period.

items.title: Notice: UK ETS Aviation Allocation Table
items.summary: The Aviation Allocation Table contains a list of each aircraft operator’s free allocation for the 2021 to 2025 allocation period.

items.title: Guidance: Participating in the UK Emissions Trading Scheme (UK ETS)
items.summary: This page provides an overview of the UK Emissions Trading Scheme (UK ETS), who it applies to, and the first steps for participants looking to engage with the scheme.

items.title: Charging regime for offshore oil and gas activities
items.summary: Proposed changes to the rates of fees in respect of offshore environmental functions and decommissioning functions

items.title: Official Statistics: Trade union statistics 2025
items.summary: Provides information on trade union membership among employees in the UK estimated from the Labour Force Survey over the period 1995 to 2025.

items.title: Form: Contracts for Difference, renewables obligation and small scale feed-in tariffs: apply for an exemption or compensation
items.summary: How to apply for an exemption or compensation for a proportion of the indirect costs of funding the Contracts for Difference, renewables obligation and small scale feed-in tariffs.

items.title: Oil and gas: offshore environmental legislation
items.summary: Environmental regulations and guidance on offshore oil and gas exploration and production offshore gas unloading and storage and offshore carbon dioxide storage activities

items.title: Guidance: Electricity Supply Emergency Code
items.summary: An outline of the process for ensuring fair distribution of electricity rationing during a prolonged electricity shortage.

items.title: Transparency data: UKAEA prompt payment return data from 2025 to 2026
items.summary: Prompt payment return data for the UK Atomic Energy Authority, showing invoices paid within 5 and 30 days of receipt from 2025 to 2026.

items.title: Policy paper: UK–China: climate change cooperation
items.summary: Memorandum of Understanding (MoU) between the UK and China on climate change.

items.title: Transparency data: DESNZ major projects: appointment letters for Senior Responsible Owners (SROs)
items.summary: Department for Energy Security and Net Zero (DESNZ) appointment letters for Government Major Projects Portfolio (GMPP) Senior Responsible Owners (SROs).

items.title: Notice: Heat Network Efficiency Scheme (HNES): privacy notice
items.summary: This notice sets out how we will use your personal data when applying to the Heat Network Efficiency Scheme (HNES).

items.title: Notice: Regulation 15(1) of the Ecodesign for Energy‑Related Products and Energy Information (Household Tumble Dryers) Regulations 2026: clarification note
items.summary: Clarification of the intended end date of the transitional period in regulation 15(1).

items.title: Policy paper: Industrial Strategy quarterly update: January to March 2026
items.summary: An update on delivery of commitments in the Industrial Strategy.

items.title: Business Secretary champions flagship investment in UK’s largest gigafactory
items.summary: Thanks to the UK’s Modern Industrial Strategy, 4,200 jobs have been secured following over £700 million of investment in the advanced manufacturing sector.

items.title: Transparency data: DBT: ministerial overseas travel and meetings, October to December 2025
items.summary: Data on ministers’ overseas travel and meetings with external individuals and organisations.

items.title: Call for input on potential powers to protect the UK from adverse economic pressure
items.summary: This call for input seeks views on whether the UK government should develop new powers to protect the UK from acts of adverse economic pressure.

items.title: Policy paper: Industrial Strategy quarterly update: October to December 2025
items.summary: An update on delivery of commitments in the Industrial Strategy.

items.title: ‘Greater Together LA’, the largest ever UK trade mission to the US, attracts major corporate sponsors
items.summary: In partnership with world-leading financial, tech and cultural organisations, the UK Government’s GREAT Britain & Northern Ireland Campaign is holding a major expo in Los Angeles, California from 18th - 22nd May, 2026.

items.title: Make Work Pay: Transfer of Undertakings (Protection of Employment) Regulations
items.summary: We are running a call for evidence on the 2014 Transfer of Undertakings (Protection of Employment) (TUPE) Regulations.

items.title: Make Work Pay: draft code of practice on trade union right of access
items.summary: We're seeking views on a draft code of practice on the new legal framework for trade unions’ access to workplaces.

items.title: Make Work Pay: trade union right of access
items.summary: We're consulting on how the new legal framework for trade unions’ right of access into workplaces should work in practice. We're seeking views on the practical and operational details of the framework.

items.title: Placing CE, or CE and UKNI marked products on the market in Northern Ireland
items.summary: What you need to do to comply with regulations which govern manufactured products placed on the Northern Ireland market.

items.title: Guidance: Open general licence (AUKUS nations)
items.summary: Licence allowing the export of dual-use items or military goods software or technology and trade of military goods, to, between and among Australia, the USA and the UK.

items.title: Accredited official statistics: Building materials and components statistics: March 2026
items.summary: Statistics and analysis on the construction sector for March 2026.
